name: flockos
description: Ministry Operating System — Free. Offline-capable. Built for every church.

scripts.build:www: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && if [ -d "FlockOS" ]; then cp -R FlockOS www/FlockOS && cp -R FlockOS/Images www/FlockOS/Images; elif [ -d "Newspaper" ]; then cp -R Newspaper www/FlockOS && cp -R Newspaper/Images www/FlockOS/Images; elif [ -d "Nations/FlockOS" ]; then cp -R Nations/FlockOS www/FlockOS && cp -R Nations/FlockOS/Images www/FlockOS/Images; else echo "No source directory found (FlockOS/Newspaper/Nations/FlockOS)" && exit 1; fi && if [ -f Newspaper/Scripts/the_living_water.js ]; then cp Newspaper/Scripts/the_living_water.js www/the_living_water.js; elif [ -f Nations/FlockOS/the_living_water.js ]; then cp Nations/FlockOS/the_living_water.js www/the_living_water.js; elif [ -f New_Covenant/the_living_water.js ]; then cp New_Covenant/the_living_water.js www/the_living_water.js; else echo "warning: no the_living_water.js found in known locations"; fi && cp index.html manifest.json www/
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:www && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
